user.title: Fridge Assistant
user.description: Add Fridge Assistant to keep track of your fridge, freezer and pantry.

data.warn_days: Warn this many days before expiry

data_description.ai_agent: Which conversation agent to use for estimates. Leave empty for the default Assist agent.
data_description.openai_api_key: If set, estimates call OpenAI directly instead of the conversation agent.
data_description.printer_url: Address of the optional Label Printer add-on. The default works when the bundled add-on is installed.

add_item.name: Add item
add_item.description: Add a product to the inventory. Shelf life is estimated automatically based on contents and location.

contents.name: Contents
contents.description: What's inside? Used to match a template.

update_item.name: Update item
update_item.description: Update fields of an existing item.

remove_item.name: Remove item
remove_item.description: Remove an item from the inventory.

complete_item.name: Complete item
complete_item.description: Mark an item as eaten or tossed. The item moves to history, with who and when.

remove_expired.name: Remove all expired
remove_expired.description: Remove all items that are past their expiry date at once (cleanup mode).

estimate.name: AI shelf-life estimate
estimate.description: Ask AI to estimate the shelf life of a product (fridge/freezer/pantry).

name.name: Product
name.description: Name of the product or dish.

add_template.name: Add template
add_template.description: Add your own template with shelf lives to the database.

print_sticker.name: Print sticker
print_sticker.description: Print (in phase 2 via the optional add-on) a sticker with the item code.

run_check.name: Run expiry check
run_check.description: Run the check for soon-to-expire items now (event + notification).
